name: Fluffy Buttermilk Pancakes
recipe:
Whisk the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
In another bowl, beat the buttermilk, eggs, and melted butter until smooth.
Pour the wet mix into the dry mix and stir just until combined — lumps are fine.
Rest the batter for 10 minutes while a skillet heats over medium-low.
Ladle 1/4 cup of batter per pancake; flip when bubbles form and the edges set.
Cook the second side until golden, then serve warm with butter and maple syrup.
